rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel United Airlines, Inc. To Appear And Produce Documents At Deposition, And Request For Sanctions Against United And Or Its Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 12, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel United Airlines, Inc. to appear and produce documents at deposition and request for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to October 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 based on the representations that United¿s deposition and document production will occur by October 18. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before October 26, then by 4:30pm on October 25 plaintiffs and United must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9:15am on October 26. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 12, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals is continued on the court¿s own motion to October 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 to allow the parties to further meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, by 4:30pm on October 25 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9:15am on October 26. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospital¿S Further Responses To Plaintiffs¿ Special Interrogatories, And Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Requests For Admission; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 12, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospital¿s further responses to plaintiffs¿ special interrogatories, requests for production and requests for admissions, and for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to October 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 to allow the parties to further meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, by 4:30pm on October 25 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9:15am on October 26. = (503/TLJ)
